label: Forms
description: Form elements, inputs, validation, and complete form compositions for data collection

components.name: FormShell
components.description: Container shell for form layouts. Provides consistent padding, max-width, and spacing for all form content inside it.
components.whenToUse: Use as the outermost wrapper for any form page. Provides structural consistency for all child form elements including inputs, selects, and submit buttons.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: maxW
props.description: Maximum width of the form shell in pixels

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between child elements in pixels

props.name: children
props.description: Child form elements to render inside the shell

components.name: InputField
components.description: Single line text input with label and validation. Supports various input types, icons, help text, and error states.
components.whenToUse: Use for any single-line text entry such as name, email, phone, password, or URL fields. Ideal inside FormShell or any form composition.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input

props.name: type
props.description: HTML input type (text, email, password, tel, url, number, etc.)

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when input is empty

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when input value changes

props.name: helpText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the input

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display below the input

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element displayed inside the input

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the input element

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of the input text in pixels

components.name: TextAreaField
components.description: Multi-line text input with optional preview and character counter. Suitable for long-form text entry like messages or descriptions.
components.whenToUse: Use when the user needs to enter multiple lines of text such as messages, comments, bios, descriptions, or blog post content.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the textarea

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when textarea is empty

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when textarea value changes

props.name: showPreview
props.description: Whether to show a live preview of the entered text

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count with counter display

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the textarea element

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of the textarea text in pixels

components.name: SelectDropdown
components.description: Dropdown select with label. Renders a native select element with styled wrapper, supporting disabled options.
components.whenToUse: Use when the user needs to choose one option from a predefined list, such as country, category, role, or sort order selectors.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the select

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: selectSize
props.description: Font size of the select text in pixels

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the select element

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: Radio button group for single selection from multiple options. Supports optional help text per option.
components.whenToUse: Use when the user must pick exactly one option from a small set of visible choices, such as plan selection, gender, payment method, or preference settings.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name attribute (shared across radios)

props.name: options
props.description: Array of radio options: {label, value, helpText?}

props.name: label
props.description: Group label displayed above the radio buttons

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the group label in pixels

props.name: itemSize
props.description: Font size of each radio option label in pixels

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between radio items in pixels

components.name: ToggleSwitch
components.description: On/off toggle switch with label and optional description. Provides a clear binary choice for enabling or disabling features.
components.whenToUse: Use for boolean settings like enabling notifications, dark mode, auto-save, or any on/off preference in settings and dashboard pages.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed next to the toggle

props.name: description
props.description: Additional description text displayed below the label

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when toggle state changes

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the toggle switch in pixels

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

components.name: DateTimePicker
components.description: Date and time input supporting multiple modes: date, time, datetime-local, month, and week. Renders a native input with styled wrapper.
components.whenToUse: Use for collecting date or time information such as appointment scheduling, event dates, booking forms, or deadline selectors.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input

props.name: mode
props.description: Input mode controlling the type of picker shown

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the date/time value changes

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of the input text in pixels

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the input element

components.name: FileUploader
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area with click-to-browse fallback. Supports multiple files, file type filtering, and size limits.
components.whenToUse: Use for file upload functionality such as profile image uploads, document attachments, resume submissions, or media uploads in forms and settings pages.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether to allow multiple file selection

props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types (MIME types or extensions)

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed in the upload area

props.name: onFiles
props.description: Callback fired when files are selected or dropped

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum file size in bytes (default 10 MB)

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the upload drop zone

components.name: ContactForm
components.description: Pre-built contact form with name, email, and message fields. Includes built-in layout, submit button, and optional title.
components.whenToUse: Use for contact pages, support forms, or any page where visitors need to send a message. Provides a complete, ready-to-use form composition.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: title
props.description: Title text displayed at the top of the form

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback fired when the form is submitted with {name, email, message}

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Font size of the title in pixels

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of field labels in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of input text in pixels

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between form fields in pixels

components.name: NewsletterSignup
components.description: Email capture form with title, subtitle, email input, and subscribe button. Designed for newsletter and mailing list signups.
components.whenToUse: Use on landing pages, blog sidebars, footers, or marketing pages to capture email addresses for newsletters and mailing lists.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: title
props.description: Title text displayed above the form

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Subtitle text displayed below the title

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback fired when the form is submitted with the email

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Font size of the title in pixels

props.name: subtitleSize
props.description: Font size of the subtitle in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of the email input in pixels

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the email input

components.name: MultiStepWizard
components.description: Multi-step form wizard with step navigation, progress indication, and per-step validation. Supports back/next navigation and a final submit.
components.whenToUse: Use for complex forms that benefit from being split into multiple steps, such as onboarding flows, checkout processes, registration wizards, or configuration setups.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: steps
props.description: Array of wizard steps: {title, description?, content: ReactNode, validate?: () => string[]}

props.name: onFinish
props.description: Callback fired when the final step is completed

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Font size of step titles in pixels

props.name: descSize
props.description: Font size of step descriptions in pixels

props.name: navBtnSize
props.description: Font size of navigation buttons in pixels

components.name: Captcha
components.description: Anti-bot verification component with checkbox or math challenge modes. Prevents automated form submissions.
components.whenToUse: Use before submit buttons on public-facing forms like contact forms, registration, and login pages to prevent spam and bot submissions.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: mode
props.description: Captcha mode: simple checkbox or math challenge

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the captcha element

props.name: onVerify
props.description: Callback fired when verification succeeds or fails

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the captcha input area

components.name: AddressAutocomplete
components.description: Address input with type-ahead suggestions dropdown. Displays matching address suggestions as the user types.
components.whenToUse: Use for address entry in checkout forms, shipping forms, registration, or any form that requires a physical address with autocomplete suggestions.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input

props.name: suggestions
props.default: ["123 Main St, Springfield, IL", "456 Oak Ave, Portland, OR", "789 Pine Rd, Austin, TX", "321 Elm Blvd, Denver, CO", "654 Maple Dr, Seattle, WA"]
props.description: Array of address suggestion strings to display

props.name: onQuery
props.description: Callback fired when the user types to fetch new suggestions

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when input is empty

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when a suggestion is selected

props.name: labelSize
props.description: Font size of the label in pixels

props.name: inputSize
props.description: Font size of the input text in pixels

props.name: inputBg
props.description: Background color of the input element

components.name: ValidationWrapper
components.description: Wraps form content to display validation errors or success messages. Shows a list of error strings or a success confirmation.
components.whenToUse: Use to wrap form sections or entire forms to provide a consolidated view of validation errors or a success state after submission.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML element or component to render as

props.name: errors
props.description: Array of error message strings to display

props.name: title
props.description: Title text displayed above the error list

props.name: success
props.description: Whether to show the success state instead of errors

props.name: successMessage
props.description: Message displayed when in success state

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Font size of the title in pixels
